key_facts: The document provides a technical drawing with dimensions for the Rheonics SRV EHEDG flush viscometer.
Rheonics specializes in inline process density and viscosity monitoring.
The drawing specifies dimensions in both millimeters and inches.
Flange type and size must be specified when placing an order.
Available flange sizes include DIN11853-1/2/3, DIN11864-1/2/3, DIN 11851, ISO 2852 (DIN 32676 B), Variline®, and BofControl®.
All wetted surfaces of the device are required to have a roughness less than Ra 0.8.
For EHEDG compliance, the criterion D-5mm>L must be fulfilled.
The drawing is proprietary property of Rheonics and may not be copied or shared without approval.
The product is protected by US and International patents.
Rheonics operates from Switzerland and the USA, with contact information provided.
